title: Sleepover!
lyrics:
[verse 1]
I can stay up late—*zoom*!
Jump on beds—*boing*, *boom*, *boom*!
Pillows fly like white balloons!
Mom won’t hear our happy tunes!

[chorus]
Sleepover! Sleepover!
Giggle till the lights go low!
Sleepover! Sleepover!
Best night ever—here we go!

[verse 2]
Flashlights make the walls glow red!
Tell a ghost tale—*gasp!* instead!
Midnight snacks—eat cake in bed!
Brush our teeth? Nah, go to—*zzz*!

[chorus]
Sleepover! Sleepover!
Giggle till the lights go low!
Sleepover! Sleepover!
Best night ever—here we go!

[ending]
Now my eyes just wanna close…
Snuggle up in pillow rows…
Sleepover dreams the best, I know…
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, full musical production, piano, bass, and claps, 126 BPM, super bouncy, high energy, strong groove, clear warm vocal, strong singalong chorus, every word easy to understand
scene: The living room carpet burns your knees as you rocket up from the couch at 4:17 p.m., pizza box still warm on the coffee table, when Mom says, “Yes, you can have a sleepover Friday!”—your arms pinwheel, backpack zippers jingle, and the word “SLEEPOVER!” detonates like confetti from your mouth.
cover_description: A kid in striped PJs belly-flops onto a giggling pile, flashlight beaming a spooky shadow on the wall.
